testcase.classname: New Capabilities Controllers DealsController delegates create/list to service
testcase.name: New Capabilities Controllers DealsController delegates create/list to service

testcase.classname: New Capabilities Controllers RankTrackerController delegates track/research to service
testcase.name: New Capabilities Controllers RankTrackerController delegates track/research to service

testcase.classname: New Capabilities Controllers CallCenterController delegates log/summarize to service
testcase.name: New Capabilities Controllers CallCenterController delegates log/summarize to service

testcase.classname: New Capabilities Controllers RevenueIntelligenceController delegates metrics request with default days
testcase.name: New Capabilities Controllers RevenueIntelligenceController delegates metrics request with default days

testcase.classname: New Capabilities Controllers ReferralEngineController keeps signup public and delegates secured operations
testcase.name: New Capabilities Controllers ReferralEngineController keeps signup public and delegates secured operations

testcase.classname: CampaignApprovalService submitForApproval creates a workflow approval and increments submission count
testcase.name: CampaignApprovalService submitForApproval creates a workflow approval and increments submission count

testcase.classname: CampaignApprovalService submitForApproval throws NotFoundException when campaign does not belong to org
testcase.name: CampaignApprovalService submitForApproval throws NotFoundException when campaign does not belong to org

testcase.classname: CampaignApprovalService submitForApproval throws BadRequestException when workflow not found or inapplicable
testcase.name: CampaignApprovalService submitForApproval throws BadRequestException when workflow not found or inapplicable

testcase.classname: CampaignApprovalService submitForApproval throws ConflictException when a PENDING approval already exists
testcase.name: CampaignApprovalService submitForApproval throws ConflictException when a PENDING approval already exists

testcase.classname: CampaignApprovalService listCampaignApprovals returns approvals for the campaign
testcase.name: CampaignApprovalService listCampaignApprovals returns approvals for the campaign

testcase.classname: CampaignApprovalService listCampaignApprovals throws NotFoundException when campaign not in org
testcase.name: CampaignApprovalService listCampaignApprovals throws NotFoundException when campaign not in org

testcase.classname: CampaignApprovalService respondToApproval approves when sufficient approvals are received
testcase.name: CampaignApprovalService respondToApproval approves when sufficient approvals are received

testcase.classname: CampaignApprovalService respondToApproval rejects immediately on any REJECTED response
testcase.name: CampaignApprovalService respondToApproval rejects immediately on any REJECTED response

testcase.classname: CampaignApprovalService respondToApproval throws NotFoundException when approval does not exist
testcase.name: CampaignApprovalService respondToApproval throws NotFoundException when approval does not exist

testcase.classname: CampaignApprovalService respondToApproval throws ForbiddenException for a different org
testcase.name: CampaignApprovalService respondToApproval throws ForbiddenException for a different org

testcase.classname: CampaignApprovalService respondToApproval throws ConflictException when approval is already resolved
testcase.name: CampaignApprovalService respondToApproval throws ConflictException when approval is already resolved

testcase.classname: CampaignApprovalService respondToApproval throws ForbiddenException when user is not a team approver
testcase.name: CampaignApprovalService respondToApproval throws ForbiddenException when user is not a team approver

testcase.classname: CampaignApprovalService respondToApproval throws ConflictException when user has already responded
testcase.name: CampaignApprovalService respondToApproval throws ConflictException when user has already responded

testcase.classname: CampaignManagerService — cloneCampaign cloneCampaign creates a copy of the campaign in DRAFT status with all ads cloned
testcase.name: CampaignManagerService — cloneCampaign cloneCampaign creates a copy of the campaign in DRAFT status with all ads cloned

testcase.classname: CampaignManagerService — cloneCampaign cloneCampaign uses provided name when specified
testcase.name: CampaignManagerService — cloneCampaign cloneCampaign uses provided name when specified

testcase.classname: CampaignManagerService — cloneCampaign cloneCampaign overrides dates when provided
testcase.name: CampaignManagerService — cloneCampaign cloneCampaign overrides dates when provided

testcase.classname: CampaignManagerService — cloneCampaign cloneCampaign throws NotFoundException when source campaign does not belong to org
testcase.name: CampaignManagerService — cloneCampaign cloneCampaign throws NotFoundException when source campaign does not belong to org

testcase.classname: CampaignManagerService — cloneCampaign cloneCampaign publishes a marketing.campaign.cloned event
testcase.name: CampaignManagerService — cloneCampaign cloneCampaign publishes a marketing.campaign.cloned event

testcase.classname: CampaignManagerService — cloneCampaign createCampaign publishes a marketing.campaign.created event
testcase.name: CampaignManagerService — cloneCampaign createCampaign publishes a marketing.campaign.created event

testcase.classname: New Capabilities Permission Metadata DealsController requires manage permission for mutating endpoints
testcase.name: New Capabilities Permission Metadata DealsController requires manage permission for mutating endpoints

testcase.classname: New Capabilities Permission Metadata DealsController requires read permission for read endpoints
testcase.name: New Capabilities Permission Metadata DealsController requires read permission for read endpoints

testcase.classname: New Capabilities Permission Metadata RankTrackerController requires manage permission for mutating endpoints
testcase.name: New Capabilities Permission Metadata RankTrackerController requires manage permission for mutating endpoints

testcase.classname: New Capabilities Permission Metadata RankTrackerController requires read permission for read endpoints
testcase.name: New Capabilities Permission Metadata RankTrackerController requires read permission for read endpoints

testcase.classname: New Capabilities Permission Metadata CallCenterController requires manage permission for mutating endpoints
testcase.name: New Capabilities Permission Metadata CallCenterController requires manage permission for mutating endpoints

testcase.classname: New Capabilities Permission Metadata CallCenterController requires read permission for read endpoints
testcase.name: New Capabilities Permission Metadata CallCenterController requires read permission for read endpoints

testcase.classname: New Capabilities Permission Metadata RevenueIntelligenceController requires read permission for metrics
testcase.name: New Capabilities Permission Metadata RevenueIntelligenceController requires read permission for metrics

testcase.classname: New Capabilities Permission Metadata ReferralEngineController requires permission for secured endpoints
testcase.name: New Capabilities Permission Metadata ReferralEngineController requires permission for secured endpoints

testcase.classname: New Capabilities Permission Metadata ReferralEngineController keeps public endpoints free of permission metadata
testcase.name: New Capabilities Permission Metadata ReferralEngineController keeps public endpoints free of permission metadata

testcase.classname: New Capabilities HTTP GET /deals/stats returns deal stats
testcase.name: New Capabilities HTTP GET /deals/stats returns deal stats

testcase.classname: New Capabilities HTTP GET /rank-tracker/stats returns rank tracker stats
testcase.name: New Capabilities HTTP GET /rank-tracker/stats returns rank tracker stats

testcase.classname: New Capabilities HTTP GET /call-center/stats returns call center stats
testcase.name: New Capabilities HTTP GET /call-center/stats returns call center stats

testcase.classname: New Capabilities HTTP GET /revenue/metrics returns revenue metrics
testcase.name: New Capabilities HTTP GET /revenue/metrics returns revenue metrics

testcase.classname: New Capabilities HTTP GET /referrals/stats returns referral stats
testcase.name: New Capabilities HTTP GET /referrals/stats returns referral stats

testcase.classname: New Capabilities HTTP POST /referrals/signup is public and works without auth user
testcase.name: New Capabilities HTTP POST /referrals/signup is public and works without auth user
